unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Sweat your way to good health and fitness!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：fit (适合的，健康的) + ness (名词后缀) = 健康，健壮。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Would you like to go to the soccer game?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：soc（来自association，协会）+ cer（人）-> 协会足球。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's in the new city stadium.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：stad (站，立) + ium (场所) -> 站满观众的地方，即体育场。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Do you want to watch the boxing match?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：box (箱子，拳击) + ing -> 拳击运动。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I have to meet my badminton coach for training.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：bad (坏的) + min (小) + ton (吨) -> 坏的小吨位羽毛球。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Why not run an exciting marathon?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 背景记忆：源自希腊地名马拉克松（Marathon），士兵菲迪皮德斯为传递捷报不停奔跑而死。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 比赛项目；大事；公开活动
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Did you hear that there's an e-sports event this weekend?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：e (出) + vent (来) -> 出来的事情，即大事、活动或比赛项目。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: phr. 跟随；到达；进步；赶快
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Would you like to come along?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 直译记忆：come (来) + along (沿着) -> 跟着一起来。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 滑雪的 & vi. 滑雪
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Zhangjiakou will host the Youth Ski Race in December.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：ski 和 sky (天空) 很像，滑雪时速度快得像在天空中飞翔。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vt. 主办；主持 & n. 主人；东道主
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Zhangjiakou will host the Youth Ski Race in December.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：host (主人) 负责 host (主办) 晚会。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 跑道；足迹 & vt. & vi. 追踪；跟踪
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: A great event for track-and-field lovers on 26 October.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：卡车 (truck) 在跑道 (track) 上行驶。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: track and field vs track and road
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: A great event for track-and-field lovers on 26 October.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：track (径赛跑道) + field (田赛场地) -> 田径。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Wonderful gym, isn't it?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 缩写记忆：gymnasium的缩写，g-y-m 就像是健身器械的简化形状。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He does gymnastics to keep in shape.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：gym (健身房) + nas (鼻) + tics -> 在健身房练体操练到流鼻血。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Come and work out at a gym!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语记忆：work (工作，起作用) + out (出来) -> 锻炼出好身材。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vi. 出汗 & vt. 使出汗 & n. 汗水
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Sweat your way to good health!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：喝甜水 (sweet) 容易出汗 (sweat)。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: phr. 获得成功；准时到达
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You can make it!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 口语记忆：make (制造，做到) + it (它) -> 做到它，即获得成功。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 传奇故事（或人物）；传说
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Help us choose some 'Living Legends of Sports'.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：leg (腿) + end (结束) -> 腿跑到了终点，成为了传奇。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They must be athletes who are masters in their sports.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：ath (谐音：爱死) + lete (力体) -> 爱死有力量和体魄的运动员。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 高手；主人 & vt. 精通；掌握
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They must be athletes who are masters in their sports.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：ma (妈妈) + s + ter (特) -> 妈妈是个特别的高手。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: set an example vs follow an example
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They must also set good examples for others.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 直译记忆：set (树立) + an example (一个例子) = 树立榜样。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: As a player, Lang Ping brought honour and glory to her country.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：h不发音，on (在...上) + our (我们的) -> 荣誉在我们身上。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: As a player, Lang Ping brought honour and glory to her country.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：glo (发光，glow) + ry -> 闪闪发光的东西就是光荣。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She led the China women's volleyball team to medals at world championships.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 小窍门：medal 像 metal，绝大多数奖章（medal）都是金属（metal）做的。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 锦标赛；冠军赛；冠军称号
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She led the China women's volleyball team to medals at world championships.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：champion (冠军) + ship (名词后缀，表示某种身份、状态或性质) = 冠军赛，锦标赛。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Two weeks later, they were world champions!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：champ (啃，咬) + ion -> 咬牙坚持到底的就是冠军。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: When the Chinese team was preparing for the 2015 World Cup, her determination was tested.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：determine (下决心) + ation (名词后缀) = 决心。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The team that Lang Ping had built was falling apart.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：a (在) + part (部分) -> 每一部分都在不同的地方，即分离的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The team that Lang Ping had built was falling apart.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：fall (倒下) + apart (分开) -> 塌下并散开，即崩溃、破裂。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He injured his leg during the match.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：in (不) + jure (法律，权利) -> 不合法的对待，引申为伤害，使受伤。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: One of the best players had been injured.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：injure (使受伤) + ed (形容词后缀) = 受伤的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She recovered from her injury quickly.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：injure (使受伤) + y (名词后缀) = 伤害，损伤。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The team captain had to leave because of heart problems.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：cap (头) + tain (持，握) -> 团队的头目，即队长。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Losing two important players was a big challenge, but Lang Ping did not lose heart.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 直译记忆：lose (失去) + heart (心) -> 失去了心，指丧失了斗志和信心。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The player who became known as 'Air Jordan' changed basketball with his graceful moves and jumps.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：grace (优雅) + ful (充满...的) = 优美的，优雅的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The mental strength that he showed made him unique.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：strong (强壮的) 的名词形式，将 o 变为 e 并加上 th。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 失败；失败的人或事物
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Jordan says that the secret to his success is learning from his failures.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：fail (失败) + ure (名词后缀) = 失败。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Losing games taught him to practise harder and never give up.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 直译记忆：give (给) + up (向上) -> 把手举起来，即投降、放弃。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Now athletes from all over the world compete in this sport.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：com (共同) + pete (追求) -> 共同追求一个目标，即竞争。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: phr. 有道理；合乎情理；表述清楚
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It doesn't make sense to cheat in exams.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语记忆：make (产生) + sense (感觉，意义) -> 产生意义，即讲得通、有道理。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He pretended to be asleep when I entered the room.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：pre (在...前) + tend (伸出) -> 在别人面前伸出（假象），即假装。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: pretend to do vs choose to do
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Do not pretend to know what you do not know.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：pretend (假装) + to do sth (做某事)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Find a sport you enjoy, even if it's just walking or yoga.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：even (甚至) + if (如果) -> 即使如果，即即使、虽然。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Millions of people watch competitions online.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 数量记忆：mil (千) + lion (大) -> 大的千，即百万。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vi. 作弊；舞弊 & vt. 欺骗；蒙骗 & n. 欺骗手段；骗子
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We should not cheat in any sports game.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：买到便宜货 (cheap) 往往是被商家欺骗 (cheat) 了。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The Winter Olympics offer audiences a chance to get to know more about winter sports.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：audi (听) + ence (名词后缀) -> 听的人，即听众、观众。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 积极的；正面的；乐观的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Try to stay positive and active.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：pos (放置) + itive -> 摆放得稳固的，引申为确定的、积极的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He is tall and slim.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：s (蛇的形状) + lim (limb，肢体) -> 像蛇一样修长，即苗条的。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 规定饮食；日常饮食 & vi. 节食
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: A balanced diet is essential for fitness.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：diet 谐音“代一天”，节食减肥，吃饭找人代替一天。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: make a difference vs tell a difference
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Exercising every day will make a difference.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 直译记忆：make (制造) + a difference (一个不同) -> 制造出不同，即产生影响。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It is rather cold today.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：father (父亲) rather (相当) 威严。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I prefer walking rather than running.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 对比记忆：rather (宁可) + than (比) -> 宁愿...而不是。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He does 50 push-ups every morning.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：push (推) + up (向上) -> 把身体向上推，即俯卧撑。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: phr. 停止做（或使用、食用）；剪下
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You should cut junk food out of your diet.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 直译记忆：cut (切) + out (出去) -> 切除出去，引申为停止、戒掉。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: now and then vs here and there
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We go to the gym now and then.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 时间记忆：now (现在) and then (那时) -> 忽而现在，忽而那时，即有时、偶尔。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: If you compare this gym with that one, you'll see the difference.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：compare (比较) + with/to (和/与)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Do you jog often?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 慢跑能强健脚骨（jog谐音脚骨）。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 压力；重音 & vt. 强调；重读
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Circle the words that the speaker stresses.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：st (死磕) + ress (press 压) -> 死磕带来的重压，即压力、强调。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Find the grammatical error in the sentence.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：err (偏离，犯错) + or (名词后缀) -> 错误。
